title: Augmented Integrity Uplift Protocol
description: Based on the visualizer's spatial model, this RFC proposes augmenting the integrity uplift protocol to address critical fault lines. The current design in forensic_integrity.rs is isolated and prone to errors. The augmented design integrates into src/core/integrity.rs with defensive JSON compression (including MessagePack fallback), bounded verification with clamping and adaptive uplift ceilings, and seamless integration with IntegrityModule and Soul weathering mechanisms. This enhances system resilience, aligns with constitutional rules, and ensures principled error handling.
